final_files.tests/test_final.py:
import pytest

from category_loader import load_category_rows
from category_paths import build_category_paths


def test_loader_rejects_parent_id_absent_from_complete_export():
    raw_rows = [
        {"id": "rugs", "name": "Rugs", "parent_id": "missing-flooring"},
        {"id": "decor", "name": "Decor", "parent_id": None},
    ]

    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="unknown parent"):
        load_category_rows(raw_rows)


def test_path_builder_rejects_parent_cycle():
    rows = [
        {"id": "seasonal", "name": "Seasonal", "parent_id": "holiday"},
        {"id": "holiday", "name": "Holiday", "parent_id": "seasonal"},
    ]

    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="cycle"):
        build_category_paths(rows)
